subcodes.first_line: O my God and God of earth and heaven, my Sovereign and Sovereign of all who dwell in the Kingdom of Names! Thou beholdest what [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا الهی و اله الارض و السماء و سلطانی و سلطان من فی ملکوت الاسماء تری ما
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for protection, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @prayer for justice and fairmindedness, @rejection, opposition and persecution
